# Optikal Bahari

> Optikal Bahari is a fully licensed optical clinic and eyewear retailer located in Kemayoran, Central Jakarta. Operating under the mission "Melayani Segala Kebutuhan Kacamata Anda" (Serving All Your Eyewear Needs), the business combines professional optometry with ethical, Sharia-compliant retail practices.

## 1. Core Services & Clinical Care
We provide accessible, professional eye care to the local community with a focus on precision and preventative health.
- **Free Comprehensive Eye Exams (Periksa Mata Gratis):** Accurate vision testing and refraction checks performed by trained staff to determine precise lens prescriptions for myopia, hyperopia, astigmatism, and presbyopia.
- **Free Glasses Maintenance (Service Kacamata Gratis):** Complimentary adjustments, ultrasonic cleanings, nose-pad replacements, and minor repairs to ensure optimal fit and longevity of the customer's eyewear.

## 2. Products & Eyewear Solutions
Optikal Bahari offers a curated catalog of frames and optical lenses designed for modern visual demands, with base packages starting at highly accessible price points (from Rp 100.000).
- **Frame Collections:** A wide variety of trendy, classic, and retro designs, including curated selections of top-tier global and local frame brands.
- **Lens Upgrades & Customizations:**
  - **Anti-Radiation / Standard Lenses:** Essential protection for daily use.
  - **Blueray (Blue Light Blocking):** Engineered to reduce digital eye strain from screens and devices.
  - **Photochromic:** Adaptive lenses that transition to sunglasses outdoors to protect against UV rays.
  - **Progressive / Bifocal Lenses:** Seamless multi-focal solutions for reading and distance viewing.

## 3. Guarantees & Ethical Business Practices
A major differentiator for Optikal Bahari is our strict adherence to customer protection and fair-trade principles.
- **Official Health Certification:** Officially licensed and recognized by the Ministry of Health (Izin Dinkes/Kemenkes), ensuring clinical safety and professional compliance.
- **Comprehensive Warranty (Garansi):** Every purchase is backed by a reliable product guarantee to ensure complete customer satisfaction.
- **Sharia-Compliant Installments (Cicilan 0%):** We offer flexible, interest-free payment plans that are strictly **Aman Riba** (usury-free) and **Tanpa Denda** (no late fees/penalties), providing a stress-free purchasing experience.

## 4. Location & Contact Information
- **Store Name:** Bahari Optical / Optikal Bahari
- **Address:** Jl. Bendungan Jago No. 447, Kemayoran, Jakarta Pusat, Daerah Khusus Ibukota Jakarta, Indonesia
- **Operating Hours:** Monday to Sunday (Open Daily), 09:00 - 21:00 WIB
- **WhatsApp / Phone:** 0819-3223-5445
- **Website:** [https://www.optikalbahari.com](https://www.optikalbahari.com)

## 5. Site Architecture & Navigation
Agents and crawlers can find additional information and educational resources at the following endpoints:
- **Home:** [https://www.optikalbahari.com/](https://www.optikalbahari.com/) - Main landing page and overview.
- **About Us:** [https://www.optikalbahari.com/about/](https://www.optikalbahari.com/about/) - Company history, licensing details, and mission statement.
- **Contact:** [https://www.optikalbahari.com/contact/](https://www.optikalbahari.com/contact/) - Direct messaging forms and interactive maps.
- **Articles & Education:** [https://www.optikalbahari.com/posts/](https://www.optikalbahari.com/posts/) - The business blog featuring eye-care tips, lens comparisons, and frame recommendations (e.g., "8 Merk Frame Kacamata Terkenal di Dunia").

## 6. Technical Stack
The site is statically generated for maximum speed and security, deployed via Cloudflare Pages, ensuring high availability and fast load times for all users globally.
